name: White Chili with Tempeh
recipeIngredient: 1 ¾ cup Vegetable broth, or more if needed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan over medium heat, cook tempeh, onion, and garlic in ½ cup vegetable broth, stirring occasionally, until onion is soft and liquid has evaporated, about 10 minutes.
2. Mix in the remaining 1 ¼ cups broth and all other ingredients; simmer for 15 to 20 minutes. Add additional broth as necessary.
3. Serve and enjoy!
